allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {generateAdsCopy} = require\('./src/claude'\); generateAdsCopy\({clientData:{name:'Kremer Signs',industry:'Sign manufacturing',toneOfVoice:'Professional, reliable',keyMessages:['Fast turnaround','UK manufactured'],avoidPhrases:[],services:[]},service:'estate agent boards',location:'South London',notes:''}\).then\(r=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(d\)\);j.calls.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.tool, c.clientName, 'in:', c.inputTokens, 'out:', c.outputTokens, 'cost:', c.costUSD, 'model:', c.model\)\)}\)")
